Name: aug_policy_ablation
Title: Ablating Data Augmentation Policy for Periapical Caries Classification
Experiment: Compare three lightweight augmentation settings in the current training pipeline: minimal augmentation, baseline augmentation, and stronger augmentation. Keep the model and optimizer fixed, then report AUC/F1/sensitivity/specificity to identify the most stable policy.

Name: imbalance_loss_comparison
Title: Class-Imbalance Loss Comparison for Periapical Caries Detection
Experiment: Benchmark standard cross-entropy, weighted cross-entropy, and focal loss under the same architecture and training budget. Focus on minority-class recall and F1 while tracking whether AUC remains stable.

Name: threshold_selection
Title: Decision-Threshold Optimization for Clinically Oriented Operating Points
Experiment: Keep the trained model fixed and tune prediction threshold on the validation set to target higher sensitivity vs higher specificity operating points. Report threshold-metric curves and compare against the default 0.5 threshold.
